summary: FULL ORDER SYSTEM TEST for SeknuTo.cz Czech lawn care - Stripe REMOVED, payment now on-site. 23/23 backend tests passed (100%). All booking flow steps 1-5 verified. Price calculation, coupons, vouchers, admin order management all working correctly.
passed_tests: === BOOKING FORM STEP 1: SERVICE SELECTION ===
Step 1 loads with service categories: Základní služby, Sezónní balíčky, Jiná služba
Can select lawn_mowing service (Sekání trávy bez hnojení)
Can select overgrown service (Hrubé sekání přerostlá)
Can select garden_work service (Zahradnické práce)
Selecting a service enables Next button
NO Stripe/payment/deposit elements visible in step 1
=== BOOKING FORM STEP 2: SIZE + CONDITION ===
Step 2 shows property size input
Step 2 shows condition selection (normal/overgrown/very_neglected)
Additional services checkboxes visible (mulching, debris removal)
For hourly service (garden_work), shows 'Odhadovaný počet hodin' not 'm²'
Price preview updates dynamically (200m² = ~400 Kč)
=== BOOKING FORM STEP 3: DATE + TIME ===
Calendar shows Czech month names (leden, únor, etc.)
Can select a date in the future
Selected date is highlighted in green box
Time slot options: Dopoledne, Odpoledne, Kdykoliv
Past dates are disabled
=== BOOKING FORM STEP 4: CONTACT + SUMMARY ===
All contact fields present: Jméno, Telefon, Email, Adresa zahrady
Coupon field visible (Slevový kupón with Ověřit button)
PAYMENT ON SITE info box shows: Banknote icon, 'Platba na místě po dokončení práce'
NO Stripe/credit card/deposit elements anywhere in step 4
Price summary shows estimated price with 'Kč' currency
Submit button says 'Odeslat rezervaci' NOT 'Zaplatit zálohu'
GDPR consent checkbox required before submit
=== BOOKING SUBMISSION ===
POST /api/bookings with all required fields returns 200 with booking id
POST /api/bookings stores booking in DB correctly (verified via GET)
POST /api/bookings with coupon_code stores coupon in booking
Step 5 confirmation shows: 'Děkujeme!', booking details, 'Platba na místě' info
Step 5 has 'Nová rezervace' button that resets form
=== PRICE CALCULATION ===
POST /api/pricing/calculate for lawn_mowing 100m² returns 200 Kč
POST /api/pricing/calculate for lawn_mowing 300m² returns 600 Kč (higher than 100m²)
POST /api/pricing/calculate with condition=overgrown returns 1.5x price (300 Kč for 100m²)
POST /api/pricing/calculate for garden_work 2 hours returns 700 Kč
Mulching additional service adds 0.5 Kč/m² (+50 Kč for 100m²)
Booking form dynamically shows price as user changes size/service
=== COUPON SYSTEM IN BOOKING ===
POST /api/admin/coupons creates coupon with discount_percent
POST /api/coupons/validate for valid code returns discount_percent
Invalid coupon code shows 'Neplatný kupón' error in red
POST /api/coupons/validate for INVALID_CODE returns 404
=== VOUCHER IN BOOKING ===
POST /api/vouchers creates percentage voucher (status=active)
POST /api/vouchers creates fixed_amount voucher (status=active)
GET /api/vouchers/:code returns voucher with is_valid=true
POST /api/vouchers/:code/claim returns redirect_url with voucher params
Voucher landing page (/poukaz/:code) loads with confetti and 24h countdown
Click 'UPLATNIT POUKAZ A OBJEDNAT' redirects to /rezervace?voucher=CODE&auto_apply=true
In booking form: coupon field is HIDDEN when voucher active
Voucher badge shows 'Poukaz aktivní: CODE' with discount
Price summary shows strikethrough original price and discounted price
=== ADMIN ORDER MANAGEMENT ===
Login to /admin with SeknuTo2025! shows dashboard
Navigate to Objednávky tab shows bookings list
Click on booking row expands to show customer details
Status change buttons visible: Čeká, Potvrzeno, Dokončeno, Zrušeno
PATCH /api/admin/bookings/:id/status updates status correctly
Customer phone visible in expanded booking
Customer email visible in expanded booking
=== UI READABILITY ===
Booking page has clear step indicator (1-5 steps shown)
Service names are in Czech and readable
Price estimate is clearly formatted with 'Kč' currency
All form labels are in Czech
Error messages are readable and in Czech ('Neplatný kupón')
critical_code_review_comments: STRIPE REMOVED: No Stripe/deposit code in BookingPage.jsx - payment is now on-site only
Submit button correctly says 'Odeslat rezervaci' instead of 'Zaplatit zálohu'
Payment info box shows Banknote icon with 'Platba na místě po dokončení práce'
Voucher system working: landing page with confetti, 24h countdown, auto-apply to booking
Coupon field correctly hidden when voucher is active
Price calculation correct for all service types including hourly services

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all booking steps, voucher flow, admin management working)

seed_data_creation: Created test bookings and vouchers during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe deposit REMOVED entirely. Payment is now on-site (cash or bank transfer). BookingPage.jsx has no Stripe code. Step 4 shows 'Platba na místě po dokončení práce' info box with Banknote icon. Submit button says 'Odeslat rezervaci'. All booking flow steps 1-5 verified. Voucher system working with landing page, confetti, countdown, and auto-apply. Admin order management working with status changes.

mocked_apis.note: Stripe payment REMOVED entirely - no mocking needed. Resend email API real but domain unverified.
